interpretation: We tested two strategies on the data: 'trade_with_disagreement' = bet the side our model leans more than the market. 'trade_against_disagreement' = bet the opposite of our model's lean (the flip hypothesis). Look at total_net_profit_per_unit_bet_after_fees. Positive = strategy made money. Negative = strategy lost money. Compare the two strategies to see if flipping helps.
